overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin in a simulation game, navigating through heavy rain in an urban European city. The bus travels along wet streets with tram tracks, passes construction zones, stops behind another bus, and turns at an intersection.

events.description: bus exits covered underpass into open rainy street

agents.ego_description: accelerating from stop under the overpass onto the main road with windshield wipers active

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure with metal beams overhead providing temporary shelter from rain
metal tram rails embedded in the road surface running parallel to the bus route
rain-slicked dark asphalt with visible puddles and reflections

segments.scene_description: The bus begins stationary under a concrete overpass sheltering from the heavy rain, then accelerates forward emerging onto an open wet street. Tram tracks are visible on the left as the vehicle transitions from the sheltered underpass to the exposed rainy road.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with tram tracks and construction barriers

agents.ego_description: cruising at steady speed along the multi-lane road passing construction zones on the right

notable_agents.action: waiting at bus stop shelter in the distance

entered.detail: red and white striped plastic barriers lining the right side of the road indicating construction zone
electrical wires suspended above the street for tram power
large yellow directional sign visible above the road ahead

segments.scene_description: Driving along a straight city street with tram tracks running parallel on the left and construction barriers lining the right. The rain continues steadily as the bus passes utility poles and approaches a yellow road sign in the distance.

events.description: bus slows and stops behind a city bus waiting at the stop
bus remains stationary waiting for the leading bus to depart

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping behind another city bus at a bus stop, then waiting

notable_agents.action: city bus stopped at bus stop with red brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: dark colored city bus stopped at the bus stop ahead with brake lights glowing red
glass and metal bus shelter structure on the right sidewalk
yellow bus stop sign with route information

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a bus stop where another city bus is halted, slowing to a stop behind it. Pedestrians are visible near the shelter on the right, and the brake lights of the leading bus glow red through the rain-streaked windshield as the vehicle waits.

events.description: bus pulls out from behind the stopped bus and begins left turn maneuver
bus completes left turn at intersection entering new street

agents.ego_description: maneuvering around the stopped bus and executing a left turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: white car waiting at the intersection during the turn

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt
traffic signal lights suspended over the intersection
multi-story building at the corner of the intersection

segments.scene_description: Pulling out from behind the stopped bus, the vehicle navigates a left turn at the intersection. Crosswalk markings and traffic lights become visible as the bus changes direction onto a new street, leaving the bus stop behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it moves from a sheltered overpass into a rain-drenched urban street and through a city intersection. It begins stationary under a concrete overpass before accelerating forward, emerging from the shelter onto an open, wet road where tram tracks run parallel to the left. As the bus continues along the straight city street, the view passes construction barriers and utility poles under a steady downpour toward a distant yellow road sign. The vehicle then slows to a halt behind another city bus at a stop, where pedestrians gather under a shelter and red brake lights glow through the rain-streaked windshield. Finally, the bus pulls away and navigates a left turn at an intersection, crossing over white road markings and passing traffic lights as it enters a new street.
